container-registry
******************


Description
===========

OCI Container Registry extension endpoints provide compatibility and
extensions for the Docker/Open Container Initiative Distribution
Registry HTTP CLI v2. Use together with the Artifacts and Container
Images CLI for control‑plane repository and image management -
https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/api/#/en/registry/20160918/


Available Commands
==================

* access-token

  * get
